message.content:
@startuml
title Send file to inbox

actor User
interface REST
interface Lookup Service
interface VFS Service
interface Storage Service
interface S3

User --> REST: get User2 inbox info {login/password}
REST --> Lookup Service: User2 {public key and /inbox access creds}
Lookup Service --> REST: encrypt and save file to user's inbox location
REST --> Storage Service: persistence
Storage Service --> S3: success
S3 --> Storage Service: success
Storage Service --> REST: success

@enduml
